name: weather-desk
title: Weather Desk
instructions: A demo MCP server: read-only weather-style tools, a couple of resources, a resource template, prompts, and a bearer-auth hook. Defensive/sample data only.

tools.name: current_conditions
tools.title: Current conditions
tools.description: Return sample current weather for a city (read-only demo).

resources.name: about
resources.title: About Weather Desk
resources.description: Static description of this demo server.

resourceTemplates.name: weather_by_city
resourceTemplates.title: Weather by city
resourceTemplates.description: Parameterized weather resource keyed by city.

prompts.name: forecast_brief
prompts.title: Forecast brief
prompts.description: Ask the model to write a short forecast brief for a city.
